designation.name: Hegemony supply wagon
designation.status: descriptive archive label; no stricter canonical game name asserted

license_policy.covered_files: The named source PNG and its Git-tracked preview may be published and distributed as part of this public repository and release.

visual_summary.description: A heavy dapple-gray draft horse in ornate black metal and leather harness pulls a rugged two-wheeled wooden field wagon loaded with dark crates, purple bedrolls, a brass telescope, bundled wooden stakes, a lantern, and a purple-and-gold banner. Repeating purple-and-gold heraldic motifs visually associate the reference with the Hegemony. The subject is isolated on a clean white presentation background with a soft ground shadow.

previews.visual_fidelity: full composition preserved without cropping or distortion
